headline: Max Porter
body: New - Stoke City have agreed a deal with #Arsenal to appoint under-21s head coach Max Porter to Mark Robins’ backroom staff. Porter highly rated and has worked with Arsenal’s 1st team. Big show of support for Robins after a poor second half
text: New - Stoke City have agreed a deal with #Arsenal to appoint under-21s head  coach Max Porter to Mark Robins’ backroom staff. Porter highly rated and has worked with Arsenal’s 1st team. Big show of support for Robins after a poor second half of the Championship season #scfc
